About

Curiosity, accuracy, and a clear eye for quality

I am a creative and detail-driven Journalism and Digital Media Specialist with a strong track record in content creation, multimedia storytelling, and quality-focused media production. I bring the same rigour I developed in newsrooms to work like image classification, text assessment, and digital content review — approaching every assignment with curiosity, accuracy, and a clear eye for quality.

Experience

Where the work happened

Digital Media Specialist

2022 — Present
Freelance Media Projects
  • Developed and delivered multimedia content for digital publications and online audiences, managing projects from brief to final publication.
  • Designed visual assets, illustrations, and graphics that complemented editorial content across web and social platforms.
  • Carried out content annotation and media evaluation tasks, improving consistency and quality across large volumes of digital material.
  • Reviewed visual and textual materials against project requirements, flagging accuracy issues and compliance gaps before publication.
  • Contributed to quality assurance workflows, helping teams maintain high editorial and technical standards.
  • Produced visual storytelling projects using both 2D and introductory 3D media techniques, expanding the scope of client narratives.

Journalism & Content Development Associate

2021 — Present
Independent Media & Editorial Projects
  • Conducted in-depth research and rigorous fact-checking for articles and media publications, ensuring every claim was grounded in verified sources.
  • Wrote and edited feature stories, news summaries, and editorial content, consistently meeting deadlines while maintaining high accuracy.
  • Evaluated content quality, readability, and audience engagement effectiveness, feeding insights back into the editorial planning process.
  • Annotated and categorised media assets to support content organisation and efficient retrieval across growing digital libraries.
  • Applied multimedia storytelling techniques — including video, infographics, and interactive elements — to deepen reader engagement.
  • Edited written materials for clarity, accuracy, tone, and audience relevance, producing polished copy ready for multi-platform publication.

Execution Notes

Digital Media Specialist

Freelance Media Projects · 2022 — Present

Brief

Take multimedia projects from initial brief through to final publication for digital audiences, owning both the creative build and the quality checks along the way.

Pipeline

BRIEF → ASSET DESIGN → ANNOTATE / EVALUATE → QA CHECK → PUBLISH
# flags accuracy issues + compliance gaps before ship

Tools & Methods

Content & data annotation, image annotation, digital illustration, graphic design fundamentals, CMS platforms, 2D and introductory 3D visual storytelling techniques.

Quality Checks

Flags accuracy issues and compliance gaps before publication, and contributes to the wider QA workflow so editorial and technical standards hold across every asset.

Outcome

Multimedia content delivered end-to-end for digital publications and online audiences, with visual storytelling that expands what a client narrative can do across web and social platforms.
Execution Notes

Journalism & Content Development Associate

Independent Media & Editorial Projects · 2021 — Present

Brief

Research, write, and edit editorial content while evaluating and organising the growing library of media assets behind it.

Pipeline

RESEARCH → FACT-CHECK → DRAFT / EDIT → ANNOTATE ASSETS → PUBLISH
# every claim grounded in verified sources

Tools & Methods

Investigative research, fact verification, multimedia journalism, cross-platform publishing, video / infographic / interactive storytelling techniques.

Quality Checks

Evaluates content quality, readability, and audience engagement effectiveness, and feeds those insights back into editorial planning — then edits every piece again for clarity, accuracy, tone, and audience relevance.

Outcome

Polished, fact-checked editorial copy that consistently meets deadlines and is ready for multi-platform publication, backed by an organised, well-annotated media library.
Project Documentation

On-Air: Radio Feature Production

Independent Media & Editorial Projects · Completed

Overview

Prepared and delivered a scripted segment in a professional broadcast booth, moving from written copy to a recorded take under real studio conditions.

Documentation

Pipeline

SCRIPT → MARK-UP / CUES → BOOTH READ → REVIEW TAKE → AIR
# scripted copy, timed and cued before recording

Outcome

A clean, broadcast-ready segment delivered on schedule, with script pacing and delivery tested against studio time constraints.
Project Documentation

Investigative Research Archive

Independent Media & Editorial Projects · Completed

Overview

Built and maintained an organised reference archive — outlines, source documents, and indexed notes — to keep long-form reporting grounded in verifiable fact.

Documentation

Pipeline

SOURCE → CROSS-REFERENCE → INDEX / TAB → FACT-CHECK → CITE
# every claim traceable back to a source

Outcome

A well-indexed reference archive that shortened turnaround on later fact-checks and kept sourcing consistent across a body of work.
Project Documentation

Reporting on Abuse & Mental Health Awareness

Independent Media & Editorial Projects · Completed

Overview

A feature series on domestic abuse and anxiety, reported to raise awareness and point readers toward support — handled with care for the subject matter and the people it affects.

Documentation

Editorial imagery used to illustrate the feature's themes.

Pipeline

SOURCE VOICES → VERIFY → DRAFT WITH CARE → SENSITIVITY REVIEW → PUBLISH
# framed around support resources, not sensationalism

Outcome

A feature that treated a difficult subject responsibly, prioritising accuracy and dignity over shock value.
Project Documentation

Field Journalism: Wildlife & Conservation

Independent Media & Editorial Projects · Completed

Overview

On-location reporting from a wildlife conservation area, documenting the landscape, the animals, and the work of the people protecting both.

Documentation

Pipeline

SCOUT → FIELD NOTES → CAPTURE → VERIFY CONTEXT → PUBLISH
# on-the-ground observation, not secondhand description

Outcome

A firsthand account of a conservation area that grounded the reporting in direct, on-site observation.

Community Storytelling: Humanitarian Reporting

Independent Media & Editorial Projects · Completed

Overview

Field reporting from a rural community outreach visit, focused on the people and daily life rather than treating the visit as a passing photo opportunity.

Documentation

Pipeline

ARRIVE / LISTEN → ENGAGE → DOCUMENT → CONTEXTUALISE → PUBLISH
# people first, story second

Outcome

A grounded, respectful account of a community visit that centred the people involved rather than the visitors.

Visual Storytelling: European Landscapes

Independent Media & Editorial Projects · Completed

Overview

A travel photography series across the Dolomites, the Swiss Alps, and the Atlantic coastline, built around composition, light, and a sense of place.

Documentation

Pipeline

SCOUT LOCATION → TIME THE LIGHT → CAPTURE → SELECT / EDIT → PUBLISH
# composition and light over volume

Outcome

A cohesive landscape series that translates travel into visual storytelling, not just a photo dump.
